'''chathala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamitist|dynamitist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamitist|dynamitist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthælæth|chæthælæth]] || [[word:chæthælæj|chæthælæj]] || [[word:chæthælæsh|chæthælæsh]] || [[word:chæthælæ|chæthælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathathalath|chathathalath]] || [[word:chathathalaj|chathathalaj]] || [[word:chathathalash|chathathalash]] || [[word:chathathala|chathathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathalath|chathalath]] || [[word:chathalaj|chathalaj]] || [[word:chathalash|chathalash]] || [[word:chathala|chathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathaflath|chathaflath]] || [[word:chathaflaj|chathaflaj]] || [[word:chathaflash|chathaflash]] || [[word:chathaflaf|chathaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathalatha|chathalatha]] || [[word:chathalaja|chathalaja]] || [[word:chathalasha|chathalasha]] || [[word:chathalaka|chathalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathalath|chathalath]] || [[word:chathalaj|chathalaj]] || [[word:chathalash|chathalash]] || [[word:chathala|chathala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathalathal|chathalathal]] || [[word:chathalajal|chathalajal]] || [[word:chathalashal|chathalashal]] || [[word:chathalakal|chathalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathalathatha|chathalathatha]] || [[word:chathalajaja|chathalajaja]] || [[word:chathalashasha|chathalashasha]] || [[word:chathalaka|chathalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathalathan|chathalathan]] || [[word:chathalajan|chathalajan]] || [[word:chathalashan|chathalashan]] || [[word:chathalakan|chathalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathalathaoro|chathalathaoro]] || [[word:chathalajaoro|chathalajaoro]] || [[word:chathalashaoro|chathalashaoro]] || [[word:chathalakaoro|chathalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
